OverHistory.UPDCommentry: PLAYS IT LATER THAN ANYONE IN THE GAME!  Vyshak Vijaykumar bowling to Sarfaraz Khan, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Sarfaraz Khan once again gets the better of the bowler with his cheeky strokeplay.
